query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: An abstract image showing soft gradients of pale lavender and muted peach-orange flowing across the frame, with diffuse edges where the colors intermingle and overlap against a hazy off-white background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image showing soft gradients of pale lavender and muted peach-orange flowing across the frame, with diffuse edges where the colors intermingle and overlap against a hazy off-white background. The colors clash incompatibly with visible banding and uneven tonal transitions, and the forms remain so indistinct that no identifiable subject emerges from the blurred color fields.
